text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Japan Cup.
Ruuumble...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Is this an earthquake?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: N-no... It's the air...

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Someone's falling out of the<n>sky!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, haaah ha ha ha! I'm<n>double—no, 500
times the greatness!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O descends! Behold,<n>world! The
Overlord has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work operating the crane,<n>Trainer. Now,
off to the paddock.
Ruuumble...

T.M. Opera O's impact has most<n>definitely
increased.

There's a frightening aura at the<n>course when we
arrive at the<n>paddock.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... That was so cool. I<n>could—well, I could
never do that...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I have to hold strong and, um... try<n>to have the
best race I can.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Although... what happens after that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Will I be your enemy forever? Or...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, my old friend. How do you feel?<n>Is your
heart set?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to don the title Dark<n>Tempest Lord
and become the<n>Centurial Overlord's lifelong
nemesis?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Dark Tempest... Lord?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... I don't know. But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll know after running with<n>you today,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Because I think I'll get to see the real<n>you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. And you shall, as I reach the<n>apex of true
beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I will speak with you again<n>once the
race has finished.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us begin. My predecessors<n>await me on
the next battlefield, the<n>Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the eve of the match! Let us<n>treat our
worldwide guests to a grand<n>and lively event.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!
